en_title: Epic Says Unreal Engine 6 Will Let Your Fortnite Skins Pop Up in Other Games
cn_title: Epic称Unreal Engine 6将让《堡垒之夜》皮肤跨游戏通用
subtitle: 虚幻6的互联梦
opus_summary: Epic发布Unreal Engine 6，提出打造开放游戏生态，让皮肤等数字资产跨游戏通用。CEO Tim Sweeney希望此举能缓解3A高成本低回报的困境，并坚称Epic不想做新霸主。引擎预计2027年底开启抢先体验。

paragraphs.en: With past mainline versions of Unreal Engine, Epic would usually kick things off with a flashy tech demo that pushes photorealism to a new level. That didn't happen with Unreal Engine 6. Because while the company showed off the same Rocket League UE6 teaser that it did a couple weeks ago, Epic CEO Tim Sweeney spent way more time focusing on his vision of an open games ecosystem.
paragraphs.cn: 在以往的虚幻引擎主要版本中，Epic通常会以一段华丽的实机技术演示开场，将照片级写实画面推至新高度。但虚幻引擎6并没有延续这一传统。虽然公司展示了与几周前相同的《火箭联盟》UE6预热视频，但Epic首席执行官Tim Sweeney却把更多时间花在了阐述其开放游戏生态系统的愿景上。

paragraphs.en: The idea, on the surface, is to get rid of the barriers between different games, letting you use skins and other cosmetics that you buy in other Unreal Engine 6 games in Fortnite, and vice-versa. It's a cool idea. After all, I barely play Fortnite, only ever peeking in when there's a cool Festival season going on (I miss Guitar Hero), but even I have a library full of cosmetic items that I'd love to import into other games. Unreal Engine 6, in theory, will let that happen.
paragraphs.cn: 乍看之下，这个想法的核心是消除不同游戏之间的壁垒，让你在《堡垒之夜》中购买的皮肤或其他外观物品，也能在其他虚幻引擎6游戏中使用，反之亦然。这主意确实很酷。毕竟，我自己很少玩《堡垒之夜》，通常只在有有趣的音乐节赛季时才会进去看一眼（我怀念《吉他英雄》），但即便如此，我的仓库里也存了一堆外观物品，巴不得能导入到其他游戏里。从理论上讲，虚幻引擎6将让这一切成为现实。

paragraphs.en: In the past, this would have been incredibly difficult to actually implement. You'd have to independently model and animate a cosmetic across every game you'd want to actually use it in. But with Unreal 6, because the systems are going to be the same across any game using the engine, it sounds like you'll just be able to drop items from one game into another and it'll just work. Of course, only time will tell whether or not that'll actually work out.
paragraphs.cn: 若放在过去，真要落实这个想法会极其困难。你得针对每一个想使用的游戏，分别为同一件外观物品独立建模和制作动画。但有了虚幻引擎6，由于任何使用该引擎的游戏都共享相同的底层系统，听起来玩家可以直接把物品从一个游戏挪到另一个游戏，它就能直接生效。当然，实际效果是否真的如此，还得等时间来验证。

paragraphs.en: The most immediate version of Epic's vision for Unreal Engine 6 will probably come in the form of Fortnite skins, but it really is just the surface. During his presentation, Tim Sweeney talked about how he has a vision for gaming something akin to the open web, where gamers can move from game to game, taking all of their digital belongings wherever they go.
paragraphs.cn: Epic对虚幻引擎6的愿景，最直接的体现可能就是《堡垒之夜》的皮肤，但这确实还只是表面。在演讲中，Tim Sweeney谈到，他对游戏未来的设想类似开放互联网，玩家可以自由地在游戏之间穿梭，带着自己所有的数字资产去往任何地方。

paragraphs.en: Again, that sounds cool, but it's almost like I've heard this exact song and dance before, when Meta spent a few years hyping the Metaverse. The idea there was incredibly similar – a persistent online marketplace and ecosystem made up of a bunch of different companies, where digital possessions would follow users. And, well, the Metaverse kind of fizzled out without ever really amounting to anything .
paragraphs.cn: 再说一遍，这个构想听起来很赞。但我隐约觉得，这套说辞我之前好像在哪听过——当年Meta花了几年时间大炒元宇宙概念，当时也是打出了几乎一模一样的旗号：一个由众多不同公司共同构成的永久性在线市场和生态系统，用户的数字资产可以随身携带。结果呢，元宇宙最终也没闹出什么名堂，就那么悄悄偃旗息鼓了。

paragraphs.en: I'm sure that Tim Sweeney took Meta's failure in mind, but it seems like he at least has a more realistic vision of what it could look like, and it helps that the Unreal Engine is already so central to game development. In short, Sweeney described a world where every game company is working together to create a centralized gaming ecosystem, with Epic, presumably, at the center.
paragraphs.cn: 我相信Tim Sweeney肯定没把Meta的失败当耳边风，但他提出的构想至少看起来更脚踏实地一些，何况虚幻引擎在游戏开发领域本就占据着举足轻重的地位。简而言之，Sweeney描绘了这样一个世界：所有游戏公司携手共建一个中心化的游戏生态系统，而Epic，大概会处在那个中心的位置。

paragraphs.en: All of this would be really good for Epic's bottom line, but Sweeney insisted that the company wouldn't be an 'overlord', saying "We want a system with no overlords, we’ve been spending some time fighting against overlords in the industry with some amount of success. And we don’t want to be the next one, rather we want to be a partner for all companies in the industry."
paragraphs.cn: 这一切显然对Epic的利润有好处，但Sweeney坚称公司不会成为「霸主」。他表示：「我们想要一个没有霸主的体系，我们花了不少时间与行业里的霸主对抗，也算取得了一些成功。而我们不想成为下一个，相反，我们想做行业内所有公司的合作伙伴。」

paragraphs.en: The 'overlords' he's talking about are clearly a reference to Epic's feuds against other digital store owners like Apple and Valve , and it's hard to not draw comparisons between those companies and what Unreal Engine 6 is trying to do. After all, Epic does collect fees on any game that uses Unreal, as long as it clears a certain revenue threshold.
paragraphs.cn: 他所指的「霸主」显然在影射Epic与苹果、Valve等数字商店所有者之间的争斗，很难不让人去比较那些公司以及Unreal Engine 6正在尝试做的事。毕竟，Epic确实对任何使用虚幻引擎的游戏收取费用，只要该游戏超过一定的收入门槛。

paragraphs.en: But unlike a digital storefront that just collects a percentage of any game sold, Epic is hoping that this new interconnected gaming platform will provide game developers some added value – especially as it gets harder to make a profit in gaming.
paragraphs.cn: 但与仅仅从每款销售游戏中抽取一定比例的数字商店不同，Epic希望这个全新的互联游戏平台能为游戏开发者提供一些附加价值——尤其是在游戏行业盈利越发困难的情况下。

paragraphs.en: At the end of the showcase, Tim Sweeney described the gaming industry as in a state of "both crisis and opportunity," because while more people are playing games than ever before, big-budget AAA games are having a harder time making a profit. It's a tale we hear over and over again, but the Epic CEO spelled it out yet again: "we're often seeing hundreds of millions in dev costs, followed by tens of millions in revenue, and dev costs are continuing to grow."
paragraphs.cn: 在发布会结尾，Tim Sweeney称游戏行业处于「危机与机遇并存」的状态，因为虽然玩游戏的人比以往任何时候都多，但预算庞大的3A大作却越来越难盈利。这是我们反复听到的故事，但这位Epic的CEO又一次说明了这一点：「我们经常看到数亿美元的开发成本，却只换来数千万美元的收入，而且开发成本还在持续增长。」

paragraphs.en: And, again, like we've heard in the past, the answer is apparently in microtransactions. According to Sweeney, "the economy is shifting from buying games to buying things in games" and "whether you're a fan of this or not, the arithmetic of it is undeniable." In his eye, this is a boon for huge games with established communities, but it's just another bar to clear for new games hoping to stay alive for more than a few months.
paragraphs.cn: 而答案——和过去听到的一样——显然在于微交易。Sweeney表示，「经济正从购买游戏转向购买游戏里的物品」，并且「无论你是否喜欢这一点，这种算术都无可否认」。在他看来，这对那些拥有稳定社区的大型游戏来说是好事，但对于渴望存活超过几个月的新游戏来说，这不过是另一道门槛。

paragraphs.en: Really, you just have to look at how many smaller multiplayer games have gone live within the last year or two, only to fizzle out and die with little to no fanfare. Just look at something like Exoprimal or Concord for an example. Sweeney's explanation of this does make some sense. After all, it's hard to get motivated to buy a bunch of cosmetic junk in a game that you don't know if it will live for more than a few months, but the math looks a lot different for a game that you've played for years and you know isn't going anywhere.
paragraphs.cn: 其实，你只需要看看过去一两年里有多少小型多人游戏上线后便无声无息地消亡就够了。仅以《原始袭变》或《星鸣特攻》为例就很能说明问题。Sweeney对此的解释确实有些道理。毕竟，在一款你都不知道能否活过几个月的游戏中，很难有动力去购买一堆装饰品垃圾，但如果是一款你玩了多年、知道会一直存在下去的游戏，这背后的算法就截然不同了。

paragraphs.en: I, for one, rarely spend any money at all in newer games, but I don't really think twice before buying a new mount or something in World of Warcraft. And that's where Unreal Engine 6 comes in. By creating this interconnected web of games through a common engine, you can buy skins and such in a new, smaller game, and know that those items will go with you when you inevitably move on to a different game. That means the devs of the smaller game get some extra cash, and it probably also means that Epic gets to enjoy a bunch of cosmetic skins they didn't have to actually make come to Fortnite, and still get a cut from their revenue.
paragraphs.cn: 就我个人而言，很少在新游戏里花什么钱，但在《魔兽世界》里买新坐骑之类的东西时，我几乎毫不犹豫。而这正是Unreal Engine 6发挥作用的地方。通过通用引擎打造出互联的游戏网络，你可以在某款较小的新游戏里购买皮肤等物品，并且知道当你不可避免地转向另一款游戏时，这些东西会跟着你一起走。这意味着小体量游戏的开发者能获得一些额外收入，也意味着Epic可以坐享一大堆无需自己动手制作就流入《堡垒之夜》的外观皮肤，同时从收入中抽成。

paragraphs.en: Only time will tell whether or not this vision of Unreal Engine 6 is going to save gaming or whatever lofty visions Tim Sweeney has for it. But, we won't have to wait long to see it in action. Beyond the bones of this concept already existing in UEFN, or Unreal Editor for Fortnite, Unreal Engine 6 will enter early access in late 2027.
paragraphs.cn: 只有时间能证明Unreal Engine 6的这种愿景——或是Tim Sweeney为它设想的种种宏大目标——到底能不能拯救游戏行业。不过，我们不用等太久就能亲眼见证它的实际表现了。除了《堡垒之夜》虚幻编辑器（UEFN）中已存在的这一概念雏形，Unreal Engine 6将于2027年底开放抢先体验。

paragraphs.en: Jackie Thomas is the Hardware and Buying Guides Editor at IGN and the PC components queen. You can follow her @Jackiecobra
paragraphs.cn: Jackie Thomas是IGN的硬件与购买指南编辑，人称PC组件女王。你可以在X上通过 @Jackiecobra关注她。
